response.justification: Bogdan is a strong candidate whose most recent role as a Staff Software Engineer is a direct match for the job description, involving work on AI-agent infrastructure, agentic workflows, and Model Context Protocol (MCP). While he may not have the full 8 years of dedicated AI experience, his extensive background as a senior/staff engineer, experience with large-scale data systems, and demonstrated leadership through project ownership and mentorship make him highly compelling. His skills in TypeScript and AWS are directly applicable, and his recent focus on the GenAI space suggests he can quickly master any missing components like specific RAG architectures.
strengths: Directly relevant recent experience with AI-agent infrastructure, agentic workflows, and MCP.
Proven Staff-level seniority and broad technical expertise across multiple languages and cloud platforms.
Demonstrated leadership, mentorship, and communication skills through founding a project and running technical workshops.
concerns: Does not meet the 8+ years requirement for production AI solutions; his dedicated AI experience appears to be very recent.
No explicit mention of experience with vector databases or Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architectures.
Python, a primary language for AI, is not listed as a core skill, though he has deep expertise in TypeScript.
